scripts.deepsec:report: pnpm run deepsec:scan && pnpm run deepsec:process && pnpm run deepsec:revalidate && node scripts/mark-accepted-risks.mjs && pnpm run deepsec:export
scripts.deepsec:report:custom: pnpm run deepsec:scan:custom && pnpm run deepsec:process && pnpm run deepsec:revalidate && node scripts/mark-accepted-risks.mjs && pnpm run deepsec:export
